question_text: is the solution of the equation 4x – 1 = 8. 5
answer_explanation: Given, one side of a square is 18x – 20 and the adjacent side is 42 – 13x. We know that, all the sides of a square are always equal. ∴ 18x – 20 = 42 – 13x ⇒ 18x + 13x = 42 + 20 ⇒ 31x = 62 ⇒ x = 6231 = 2 units Hence, side of the square is (18 × 2) – 20 = 36 – 20 = 16 units. shaalaa.com Chapter 4: Simple Equations - Exercise Chapter 4 Simple Equations Exercise | Q 103. | Page 115 #### Video TutorialsVIEW ALL ####
